findings.name: FREESWITCH_EXTERNAL_SIP_IP
findings.message: not set — if FreeSWITCH is behind NAT, set this to the public SIP IP (e.g. 203.0.113.1 or auto-nat); see docs/ops/sip-tls-srtp-nat.md

findings.name: FREESWITCH_EXTERNAL_RTP_IP
findings.message: not set — if FreeSWITCH is behind NAT, set this to the public RTP IP; see docs/ops/sip-tls-srtp-nat.md

findings.name: FREESWITCH_RTP_PORT_MIN / FREESWITCH_RTP_PORT_MAX
findings.message: RTP port range not documented — set FREESWITCH_RTP_PORT_MIN and FREESWITCH_RTP_PORT_MAX to match the range in FreeSWITCH vars.xml; this ensures firewall rules cover the correct range

findings.name: SRTP_POLICY
findings.message: SRTP policy not documented — set SRTP_POLICY to disabled, optional, or required to declare the deployment media security posture; see docs/ops/sip-tls-srtp-nat.md
